steps.title: Set up
steps.content: Find the slope using two table points: $m = \dfrac{\left(27 + \frac{1}{27}\right) - \left(27 + \frac{11}{27}\right)}{-1-(-11)} = \dfrac{-\frac{10}{27}}{10} = -\dfrac{1}{27}$.

steps.title: Solve
steps.content: Use point-slope form with $(-1,\ 27 + \frac{1}{27})$: $y = -\frac{1}{27}x + 27$. Set $y = 0$: $\frac{1}{27}x = 27 \Rightarrow x = 729$.
